ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country or region */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to (e.g., Europe, Asia) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness score */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country or region the score belongs to */,
  "score" REAL /* Happiness score */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support score */,
  "healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy score */,
  "freedom_to_make_life_choices" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices score */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity score */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Perceptions of corruption score */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the happiness score was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the happiness score */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_methodology FOREIGN KEY ("methodology") REFERENCES methodologies ("methodology_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_per_capita" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP per capita entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country or region the GDP per capita belongs to */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the GDP per capita was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the GDP data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the GDP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_per_capita_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_per_capita_methodology FOREIGN KEY ("methodology") REFERENCES methodologies ("methodology_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_per_capita_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_support" (
  "social_support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social support entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country or region the social support belongs to */,
  "social_support_score" REAL /* Social support score */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the social support was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the social support data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_support_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_support_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_support_methodology FOREIGN KEY ("methodology") REFERENCES methodologies ("methodology_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthy_life_expectancy" (
  "healthy_life_expectancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthy life expectancy entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country or region the healthy life expectancy belongs to */,
  "healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy score */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the healthy life expectancy was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the healthy life expectancy data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("healthy_life_expectancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthy_life_expectancy_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthy_life_expectancy_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthy_life_expectancy_methodology FOREIGN KEY ("methodology") REFERENCES methodologies ("methodology_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "freedom_to_make_life_choices" (
  "freedom_to_make_life_choices_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each freedom to make life choices entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country or region the freedom to make life choices belongs to */,
  "freedom_to_make_life_choices_score" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices score */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the freedom to make life choices was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the freedom to make life choices data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freedom_to_make_life_choices_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_freedom_to_make_life_choices_methodology FOREIGN KEY ("methodology") REFERENCES methodologies ("methodology_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_freedom_to_make_life_choices_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_freedom_to_make_life_choices_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generosity" (
  "generosity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generosity entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country or region the generosity belongs to */,
  "generosity_score" REAL /* Generosity score */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the generosity was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the generosity data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generosity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generosity_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generosity_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generosity_methodology FOREIGN KEY ("methodology") REFERENCES methodologies ("methodology_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "perceptions_of_corruption" (
  "perceptions_of_corruption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each perceptions of corruption entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country or region the perceptions of corruption belongs to */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption_score" REAL /* Perceptions of corruption score */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the perceptions of corruption was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the perceptions of corruption data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perceptions_of_corruption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_perceptions_of_corruption_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_perceptions_of_corruption_methodology FOREIGN KEY ("methodology") REFERENCES methodologies ("methodology_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_perceptions_of_corruption_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the happiness score being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the happiness score */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the happiness score was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES happiness_scores ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or string describing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., World Bank, United Nations) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methodologies" (
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each methodology */,
  "methodology_name" TEXT /* Name of the methodology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the methodology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("methodology_id")
)
